uses: Leptorkis diodon is a plant species commonly used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia. Its roots are used to treat fever and other health issues. Traditionally, the plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory properties, which help in reducing pain and swelling. In folk medicine, Leptorkis diodon is also used to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. Further research is needed to confirm the plant's medicinal properties and potential side effects.
